createBlogPage.seoDescription: Create a new article on VNSEEA with title, content, topic, tags and thumbnail.
createBlogPage.heroDescription: Draft the title, content, topic, hashtags and cover image before publishing to the Blogs feed.
createBlogPage.contentDescription: These fields simulate the create blog UI from audit P-25 and do not call the real API yet.
createBlogPage.tagsHelp: Tags will appear here after input, separated by commas.
createBlogPage.submitHint: Mock state: the form only simulates UI and does not submit yet.
createBlogPage.statReadingDescription: Estimated reading time from current content.
createBlogPage.statTagsDescription: Hashtags help people find the article.
createBlogPage.emptyPreviewExcerpt: The opening excerpt will appear in the preview so you can review reading flow before publishing.
createBlogPage.checkTitleDescription: Use at least 12 characters so the blog card is not empty or too short.
createBlogPage.checkContentDescription: Use at least 80 characters so the reader layout has main content.
createBlogPage.checkTopicTagsDescription: Choose the right category and add at least one hashtag.
createBlogPage.checkThumbnailDescription: A cover image helps the article stand out in the blogs list.
createBlogPage.draftSaved: Mock draft saved. The content remains in the current page state.
createBlogPage.publishComplete: Mock publish complete. When the API is connected, this button will send data to blogs.php.
createBlogPage.publishMissing: Complete the missing checklist items before real publishing.
createBlogPage.demoContent:
When residents participate from the beginning, tree planting, waste sorting and public cleanliness plans are easier to maintain. This article records how a small group divides roles, keeps an update schedule and measures results after each week of work.

## Highlights
- Each group has one person responsible for reminders.
- Results are updated with before and after photos.
- Small activities are repeated consistently instead of being organized too large.

readBlogPage.notFound: This slug was not found in mock data, so the nearest sample article is open.
readBlogPage.author: Author
readBlogPage.authorDescription: This author contributes featured articles to the VNSEEA Blogs feed.
readBlogPage.comment1Body: The reader layout is easy to follow, and the related section on the right helps move to the next article quickly.
readBlogPage.comment2Body: The mock content is useful for testing the reader, reactions and comments before connecting the real API.
readBlogPage.article1Body1: Demand for recycled plastics is rising as more businesses move toward clearer sustainability goals. Instead of treating recycled material as a secondary choice, many supply chains are starting to include recycled plastic pellets in long-term purchasing plans.
readBlogPage.article1Body2: The biggest shift is input quality. Manufacturers need stable material sources, transparent sorting processes and better traceability to meet international partner standards.
readBlogPage.article1Body3: Over the next few years, the market may keep growing if businesses can balance cost, quality and the ability to prove environmental impact with reliable data.
readBlogPage.article2Body1: Industrial and automotive gas hoses are not just replacement accessories. They directly affect operational safety, material durability and pressure tolerance across different environments.
readBlogPage.article2Body2: When choosing a manufacturer, companies usually care about inspection, material standards, delivery time and support for custom production batches.
readBlogPage.article2Body3: A clear evaluation process reduces maintenance risk and keeps system performance stable.
readBlogPage.article3Body1: After work, young professionals often do not lack resources; they lack a sustainable learning rhythm. Short classes, small goals and study groups with fixed schedules make learning easier to maintain.
readBlogPage.article3Body2: A productive week does not necessarily require many study hours. What matters is choosing the right skill, recording progress and producing something small after each learning cycle.
readBlogPage.article3Body3: When learning is scheduled as a regular activity, pressure drops and accumulated results become clearer.
readBlogPage.article4Body1: Small apartments need clear zoning. When each item has a specific role, the space feels easier to breathe without removing all personality.
readBlogPage.article4Body2: Natural light, closed storage and a restrained color palette reduce clutter. Small accents like artwork, plants or textiles can keep the space warm.
readBlogPage.article4Body3: Effective minimalism is not emptiness; it is keeping what is actually used and meaningful.
readBlogPage.article5Body1: Personalized news feeds are moving from simple metrics to models that understand more context. Systems do not only check which articles get many views, but also how users interact over time.
readBlogPage.article5Body2: This makes content more relevant, but it also requires interfaces to be transparent about recommendations and allow users to adjust preferences.
readBlogPage.article5Body3: A good reading feed balances familiarity and discovery, avoiding pushing users into too narrow a topic range.
readBlogPage.article6Body1: A weekend trip near the coast should keep the itinerary light. Choosing fewer stops, prioritizing rest time and preparing food options in advance makes the trip more comfortable.
readBlogPage.article6Body2: If traveling by car, check the weather, route and parking before leaving. These small details help avoid wasting time after arrival.
readBlogPage.article6Body3: The most important thing is keeping the pace slow enough for the trip to actually feel like a break.
readBlogPage.article7Body1: Community football teams often struggle to keep a schedule because members have different availability. Clear role assignment reduces dependence on a single organizer.
readBlogPage.article7Body2: A consistent practice schedule needs a fixed field, reminder group and simple fitness tracking. Teams do not need complex systems to improve discipline.
readBlogPage.article7Body3: When everyone knows when they need to show up and why, practice quality becomes more stable.
readBlogPage.article8Body1: Small game development teams often start with very focused prototypes. They test ideas, controls and the core loop before expanding content.
readBlogPage.article8Body2: The strength of indie games is the ability to tell familiar stories, test unusual mechanics and respond quickly to early players.
readBlogPage.article8Body3: When scope is kept clear, a small team can still create a product with its own identity.

jobsPage.job1Description: Build social interfaces, optimize Nuxt/Vue performance, and work with the design system to ship new product flows.
jobsPage.job1Requirement1: Strong with Vue 3, Nuxt, TypeScript, and component architecture.
jobsPage.job1Requirement2: Experience optimizing responsive UI, accessibility, and performance.
jobsPage.job1Requirement3: Comfortable working with APIs, state management, and reusable component design.
jobsPage.job1Benefit1: Hybrid schedule, 3 days per week onsite.
jobsPage.job1Benefit2: Learning budget and work equipment support.
jobsPage.job1Benefit3: Salary reviews aligned with product cycles.
jobsPage.job2Description: Design experiences for community, marketplace, and content features, and turn product requirements into clear prototypes.
jobsPage.job2Requirement1: A portfolio of real web or app products that shipped.
jobsPage.job2Requirement2: Strong in Figma, design systems, and frontend handoff.
jobsPage.job2Requirement3: Experience with social products or community tools is a plus.
jobsPage.job2Benefit2: Shape the UI system from the beginning.
jobsPage.job3Description: Run growth campaigns, build content funnels, and work with the founder community to expand the qualified user base.
jobsPage.job3Requirement2: Strong with data, funnel analysis, and retention.
jobsPage.job4Description: Find partners, manage business clients, and grow the sales pipeline for community products.
jobsPage.job4Requirement2: B2B or partnership experience is a plus.
jobsPage.job4Requirement3: Able to use CRM tools and pipeline reporting.
jobsPage.job4Benefit3: Path to a team lead role.
jobsPage.job5Location: Binh Thanh, Ho Chi Minh City
jobsPage.job5Description: Track campaign budgets, reconcile transactions, and prepare operations reports for community fundraising projects.
jobsPage.job5Requirement2: Advanced Excel or Google Sheets skills.
jobsPage.job5Requirement3: Project finance operations experience is preferred.
jobsPage.job6Description: Support community operations, compile member feedback, prepare online events, and keep community data updated.
jobsPage.job6Requirement2: Comfortable with Notion, Sheets, or similar tools.
jobsPage.job6Requirement3: Available for at least 20 hours per week.
jobsPage.job6Benefit3: Opportunity to continue as a long-term contributor.

cong-dong-xe-dien-viet.summary: Reviews of electric vehicles, charging stations, maintenance experience, and real-world usage journeys.
guidelines: Prioritize hands-on reviews with photos or metrics whenever possible.
Do not post direct selling content outside the scope of EVs and related accessories.
Keep discussions respectful and focused on solutions and useful knowledge.

founder-circle-vietnam.summary: A space to discuss operations, growth, and strategy for founders, C-level leaders, and builders.
founder-circle-vietnam.locationLabel: Ha Noi · Ho Chi Minh City · Online
guidelines: Keep posts concise and go straight to the problem and context you want feedback on.
Do not flood the main feed with hiring posts or service pitches.
Respect privacy when sharing internal numbers and sensitive operational details.

ai-product-builders.summary: Focused on AI products, automation, datasets, prompt engineering, and weekly product demos.
guidelines: Prioritize demos with visuals, video, or a prototype link so people can respond quickly.
Tag posts clearly by intent: research, case study, prompt, automation, or launch.
Avoid sharing sensitive customer data or confidential company information.

di-va-hoc.summary: A group for workshops, courses, study materials, and meetup schedules for working professionals.
guidelines: Shared documents should include sources so others can verify and continue learning.
Short notes and key insights after each workshop are encouraged.
Do not spam unrelated course links or affiliate content.

weekend-escape-club.summary: Plan short getaways, share compact itineraries, homestays, and ticket-hunting experience.
guidelines: When reviewing a place, include cost, travel time, and practical notes.
Respect local environments and avoid promoting harmful activities.
Do not share unreliable or unverified tour-hunting information.

threads.title: How can I write clearer job posts?
threads.author: Minh Anh
threads.excerpt: I need a checklist for title, salary, location, requirements, and benefits so candidates can scan quickly.

replies.author: Justin
replies.message: Put the salary range and remote policy in the first three lines.

threads.title: Showcase: the green classroom campaign has reached 70%

threads.excerpt: Updated photos, progress, and the next preparation steps after the funding campaign gained momentum.

replies.author: Quynh Lan
replies.message: The cost report is transparent and should be pinned in the funding detail view.

walletPage.seoDescription: View balance, top up, and send money using the VNSEEA wallet.

fundingPage.seoDescription: Create fundraising campaigns, search and filter by category, track progress, and make mock donations in the VNSEEA community.
fundingPage.heroDescription: Explore active campaigns, track progress, view supporter lists, and contribute directly.
fundingPage.filtersDescription: Search by campaign name, owner, or location; filter by category and fundraising status.
fundingPage.emptyDescription: Remove some keywords or switch the category to see more active campaigns.
fundingPage.messagePlaceholder: Send a note to the campaign owner.
fundingPage.donateSuccess: Mock donation sent. No funding.php / wallet.php API call yet.
fundingPage.campaign1Title: Green classroom kits for suburban schools
fundingPage.campaign1Summary: Provide recycled desks, plants, and reading corners for three suburban classrooms.
fundingPage.campaign1Description: This campaign aims to create a brighter, greener learning space with basic reading materials for primary school students in suburban areas.
fundingPage.campaign1Impact2: 3 classrooms receive plants and recycled desks.
fundingPage.campaign1Impact3: Teachers receive an after-school activity kit.
fundingPage.campaign1Reward3: Donor name on the gratitude board
fundingPage.campaign1Donor1Message: Supporting a better study corner for the kids.
fundingPage.campaign1Donor2Message: Hope the campaign reaches its goal soon.
fundingPage.campaign2Summary: Organize a free general health screening and consultation day for workers.
fundingPage.campaign2Description: The fund covers equipment rental, essential medicine, and volunteer medical staff.
fundingPage.campaign2Impact3: Health guidance materials after the program.
fundingPage.campaign2Donor1Message: Hope this program reaches many people.
fundingPage.campaign3Summary: Prepare tools, sorting bags, and collection vehicles for a riverbank cleanup activity.
fundingPage.campaign3Description: The campaign has already reached its goal and is moving into the rollout phase with the local volunteer team.
fundingPage.campaign3Reward3: Thank-you note on the community page
fundingPage.campaign4Summary: Support micro-grants for founder teams testing their first product.
fundingPage.campaign4Description: The fund provides small grants, mentoring, and market-testing support for early-stage founder teams.
fundingPage.campaign4Impact3: A demo day at the end of the campaign.
fundingPage.campaign4Reward3: Donor name on the campaign landing page

createFundingPage.seoDescription: Crowdfunding campaign form with title, description, target amount, and cover image.
createFundingPage.heroDescription: Enter the title, description, target amount, and cover image for the campaign. This form simulates the `funding.php` flow and does not submit to the server yet.
createFundingPage.prepItem2: Set a target amount that can be verified.
createFundingPage.prepItem3: Add a campaign image that matches the content.
createFundingPage.previewDescription: Once the real API is connected, a new campaign will go back to `/funding` and the detail page `/show_fund/{id}`.
createFundingPage.createdCount: {count} campaigns created in the current session.
createFundingPage.formDescription: Enter the title, description, target amount, and campaign image.
createFundingPage.descriptionPlaceholder: Goal, beneficiaries, and how the funds will be used.
createFundingPage.successMessage: Mock campaign created. No funding.php API call yet.

showFundPage.notFoundDescription: The campaign may have been deleted or the path may be incorrect.
showFundPage.editMessage: Mock edited the campaign. No funding.php API call yet.
showFundPage.deleteMessage: Mock deleted the campaign. No funding.php API call yet.

livePage.seoDescription: Create livestreams, watch a mock live player, and test realtime chat in the VNSEEA community.
livePage.heroDescription: Create livestreams, watch the player, test realtime chat, and prepare the `live.php` integration with Agora, LiveKit, or Millicast.
livePage.setupDescription: Agora, LiveKit, or Millicast will replace the mock player once the backend is connected.
livePage.statLiveDescription: Channels currently streaming in mock data.
livePage.readinessCreateDescription: The Go Live form simulates a payload sent to live.php.
livePage.readinessPlayerDescription: The player supports live state, mute, likes, and viewer count.
livePage.readinessChatDescription: Mock realtime comments, ready to swap with socket or API.
livePage.playerReady: Mock player, ready for a live provider
livePage.chatHint: Mock comment only, no `live.php` API call yet.
livePage.modalDescription: Mock form for `live.php`, ready to connect a realtime provider.
livePage.modalDescriptionPlaceholder: Main topic, guests, and agenda for the live session...
livePage.modalSuccess: Mock live stream created. No live.php API call yet.
livePage.newStreamDescription: A new livestream was created in the current mock session.
livePage.systemMessage: The live stream was simulated. No live.php API call yet.
livePage.stream1Description: Product demo updates, community Q&A, and a look at upcoming livestream plans.
livePage.stream1Comment1: Audio is clear now, the demo looks solid.
livePage.stream1Comment2: I will answer that after this pitch section.
livePage.stream1Comment3: Will there be a replay available?
livePage.stream2Description: Quick Q&A for new founders: pitching, first customers, and the checklist before demo day.
livePage.stream3Description: A livestream about building green study corners and making implementation costs transparent.

watchPage.shareSuccess: Mock shared the video. No post-actions.php API call yet.

explorePage.seoDescription: Discover recommended posts, people, and fanpages on VNSEEA.
explorePage.heroTitle: Discover relevant content, people, and fanpages
explorePage.heroDescription: The /explore page brings together three audited flows: recommended posts, suggested people, and fanpages to follow. It reuses the existing post and fanpage cards, with a separate user card to avoid repeated UI.
explorePage.emptyDescription: The current mock has no content for this filter. Switch back to all content or use search to find a specific keyword.
explorePage.viewAllDescription: Show posts, connections, and fanpages that are most relevant right now.
explorePage.viewPostsDescription: Prioritize posts with high engagement in the current social mock.
explorePage.viewUsersDescription: Suggest profiles based on mutual friends, roles, and recent activity.
explorePage.viewPagesDescription: Content and brand pages that are worth following next.
explorePage.sectionPostsDescription: Posts with the highest engagement in the current social mock feed.
explorePage.sectionUsersDescription: Relevant profiles selected from suggested users and contacts who are online.
explorePage.sectionPagesDescription: Highlighted fanpages and community pages from the existing system directory.
explorePage.summaryPostsDescription: Posts with the best engagement in the social mock.
explorePage.summaryUsersDescription: Profiles collected from suggested users and active contacts.
explorePage.summaryPagesDescription: Community and brand pages worth opening deeper.
explorePage.suggestionMeta: Suggested from your recent interaction network
explorePage.highMutualReason: Shares many overlapping connections and professional topics close to what you follow.
explorePage.defaultUserReason: Matches topics you have shown interest in through search and hashtags.
explorePage.onlineMeta: Appears in the online chat list
explorePage.onlineReason: Already in your direct contact network, suitable for a quick connection.

savedPostsPage.seoDescription: Review your saved posts and remove saved items directly on VNSEEA.
savedPostsPage.heroDescription: This page gathers bookmarked posts from the current mock session. You can reopen posts, track the saved source, and remove them directly from the list.
savedPostsPage.statSavedDescription: Posts still appearing in the mock bookmark list.
savedPostsPage.statAuthorsDescription: People who published the posts you are keeping.
savedPostsPage.statCollectionsDescription: Quick save groups for separating posts by reference purpose.
savedPostsPage.statInteractionsDescription: Total likes, comments, and shares across the saved posts.
savedPostsPage.emptyTitle: You have not kept any posts yet
savedPostsPage.emptyDescription: The saved posts list is empty. Return to the feed, search, or explore to save content for later.
savedPostsPage.listDescription: Each post can be removed independently. When everything is removed, this page switches to the empty state so you can retest the restore flow.
savedPostsPage.noteFirst: Keep this for reference while finishing secondary page flows and shared social feed components.
savedPostsPage.noteSecond: Use as inspiration for hero blocks and community-brand content rhythm.

pokePage.seoDescription: View poke requests and quickly poke back VNSEEA connections.
pokePage.heroDescription: The /poke page keeps the audited flow simple: current poke requests and a direct poke-back button for each person.
pokePage.statNewPokesDescription: Light touches currently shown in the mock list.
pokePage.statPokedBackDescription: Connections you responded to in this session.
pokePage.statOnlineDescription: People who can keep chatting right after you poke back.
pokePage.statPendingDescription: Pokes you have not returned in the current session.
pokePage.listDescription: This is a lightweight reconnect flow. You can poke each person back or open their profile before responding.
pokePage.suggestionNote: This person just visited your profile and sent a light poke to reopen the conversation.
pokePage.onlineChatContext: Appears in the online chat list
pokePage.onlineChatNote: A light touch to revive the connection without opening a message thread right away.

memoriesPage.seoDescription: Look back at posts from this day in past years and share them again on VNSEEA.
memoriesPage.heroTitle: What did you share on this day?
memoriesPage.heroDescription: The /memories page brings together posts from the same day in previous years and adds a direct reshare action to each memory.
memoriesPage.statMemoriesDescription: Same-day posts pulled back from the mock social feed.
memoriesPage.statYearsDescription: Distinct year markers currently appearing in the memories timeline.
memoriesPage.statSharedDescription: Memories you replayed to the feed in this session.
memoriesPage.statInteractionsDescription: Total interactions from the memory posts currently shown.
memoriesPage.sectionDescription: Each post keeps the shared post card, while the reshare action stays outside so the existing feed component remains untouched.
memoriesPage.memoryOneReflection: The moment the team settled on componentization to speed up secondary pages.
memoriesPage.memoryTwoReflection: This post recalls the early visual direction for profile and the first business page.

goProPage.emptyPayments: No payments in this session yet.
goProPage.billingDescription: Choose monthly or yearly to view the matching price.
goProPage.plansDescription: Plans are laid out wider so pricing, benefits, and limits are easier to read.
goProPage.comparisonDescription: Core benefits for each Pro plan.

page.title: Checkout | VNSEEA
page.description: Complete your marketplace checkout with the shipping address form, cart, wallet balance, and total payment.
page.layoutDescription: Fill in the delivery address, verify the cart, and choose a payment method before confirming your order.

summary.title: Shopping Cart
summary.insufficientBalance: You do not have enough balance to make a purchase, please top up your wallet before continuing with this method.
summary.walletBalance: Wallet has {balance}. You need to top up {amount} more to continue the purchase.
summary.walletHint: Current wallet balance is {balance}. This UI follows the internal mock checkout using the internal wallet.
summary.emptyCartHint: Please go back to the marketplace to select more products before continuing checkout.

shippingForm.savedAddressDesc: The order will prioritize this address, you can still modify the form below.
shippingForm.noAddressDesc: Quickly fill in the form below so the system has enough delivery information for this order.
shippingForm.addAddressHint: Please add a new address below to continue.
shippingForm.fieldsRemaining: Fill in all {count} fields to enable the save address button.
shippingForm.shippingInfoPersist: Shipping information will be kept for further checkout steps.
shippingForm.formDesc: The form has been grouped by info clusters for faster desktop operation while remaining compact on mobile.
shippingForm.recipientInfoDesc: Enter name and phone number for easier courier contact.
shippingForm.regionDesc: Fill in location for precise delivery point aggregation.
shippingForm.pointDetailDesc: Clearly state house number, street name, ward/commune to avoid failed delivery.
shippingForm.mockWarning: The order will use the exact information you save here. This is a mock UI so it hasn't sent real data to API `address.php`.

page.title: My Orders | VNSEEA
page.description: Track your purchases, shipping status, and overview of your marketplace orders on VNSEEA.
page.layoutDescription: Track marketplace purchases, check delivery status, and reopen order details when needed.
page.detailDescription: Track order status, check delivery information, and review all products in the transaction.
page.customerDescription: Follow a specific sale, check buyer information, and prepare shipment update steps.

pending.label: Pending
pending.description: The order has just been placed and is waiting for shop confirmation.

shipping.label: Shipping
shipping.description: The order has left the warehouse and is on its way to you.

delivered.label: Completed
delivered.description: The order has been delivered successfully and can be reviewed.

cancelled.label: Cancelled
cancelled.description: Orders that were cancelled or refunded to your internal wallet.

sidebar.flowHintReal: Data updated from VNSEEA marketplace system.
sidebar.flowHintMarketplace: System automatically syncs shipping status from partners.
sidebar.helpAction: Please contact VNSEEA buyer support center.
sidebar.tasksAction: Go back to the order list to open the order you want to track.
sidebar.sellerTasksAction: Go back to the seller area to open the customer order you want to process.

placed.label: Placed
placed.description: You have successfully submitted the purchase request.

processing.label: Shop Processing
processing.description: The seller is preparing and confirming your order.

shipping.label: Shipping
shipping.description: The order has been handed over to the shipping unit.

completed.label: Completed
completed.description: You have received the goods and the order is successfully closed.

detail.noNote: This order has no additional notes.
detail.notFoundDesc: This order code does not exist in the current mock data. Please go back to the order list to select another one.
detail.sellerNotFoundDesc: This order ID does not exist in current seller mock data. Go back to products to open another.
detail.noBuyerNote: The customer left no additional notes.
detail.noInternalNote: No internal notes for this order yet.
detail.cancelledWarning: The order was cancelled so you cannot continue to update `Shipped` or `Completed`. Please save notes and close the refund file.
detail.shippedDesc: Use when the order has been labeled and handed over to the shipping unit.
detail.completedDesc: Use when the customer has received all goods and the order is eligible for payout closing.

queued.label: Queued
queued.description: Funds are on hold until the order is completed.

processing.label: Processing
processing.description: Payout is being processed and transferred to shop wallet.

completed.label: Completed
completed.description: Funds have been added to the shop's available balance.

cancelled.label: Cancelled
cancelled.description: The payout has been cancelled due to order error/return.

empty.noMatchedDesc: Try changing filters or search keywords. When you buy a new product, orders will appear here.

created.label: Order created
created.description: The order has been recorded and is waiting for shop confirmation.

confirmed.label: Shop confirmed
confirmed.description: The shop will check inventory and prepare your order.

shipping.label: Handed over to shipping
shipping.description: The order will be handed over to the shipping unit after confirmation.

delivered.label: Delivered successfully
delivered.description: You will receive a notification when the order is completed.

shipping_active.label: Shipping
shipping_active.description: The order is on the delivery truck and will arrive today.

cancelled.label: Cancellation request
cancelled.description: The buyer submitted a cancellation request before confirmation.

refunded.label: Refunded & closed
refunded.description: The funds have been refunded to the internal VNSEEA wallet.

payment.label: Verify payment
payment.description: Internal wallet has recorded success or funds have reached the system.

stock.label: Check inventory
stock.description: Ensure sufficient quantity, accessories, and packaging condition.

packing.label: Pack & Print label
packing.description: Must be completed before handing over to the shipping unit.

handoff.label: Handover to shipper
handoff.description: The system will open payout after the order leaves the warehouse.

delivery.expected2h: Shop expected to confirm in 2 hours

delivery.cancelledBeforeHandoff: Cancelled before handing over to shipping

payout.window24h: Payout in 24-48 hours after successful delivery

pagesDirectory.title: Pages
pagesDirectory.desc: Manage your followed fanpages, see suitable suggestions, and quickly open the new page creation flow in the same area.
pagesDirectory.emptyMineDesc: You haven't created any fanpages on this account yet. Start with a new page to introduce your brand, service, or content channel.
pagesDirectory.emptyOtherDesc: This tab currently has no mock data. You can switch to another tab or create a new page to get started.
pagesDirectory.seoSuggestedDesc: List of suggested fanpages on VNSEEA.
pagesDirectory.seoFavoriteDesc: List of favorite fanpages on VNSEEA.
pagesDirectory.seoMineDesc: Fanpage directory on VNSEEA with my pages, suggested pages, and favorite pages.

group.title: Create new group
group.description: Set up a new community for members to exchange, share content, and connect around a common topic.

page.title: Create new page
page.description: Create a fanpage for your brand, store, professional, or content project to start posting, receiving followers, and building a public presence.
page.identitySectionTitle: Short, easy to remember, and identifiable page name
page.identitySectionBadge: Good for search, sharing, and public profile
page.identityHint: Name should match the brand, service, or main persona
page.descriptionSectionTitle: Let followers know what you are offering
page.descriptionHint: Tip: specify who the brand is, what target group it serves, and what main content you will post.
page.configurationSectionTitle: Choose a category for the system to target the right audience
page.actionDescription: Once completed, you can add a cover, avatar, CTA, contact info, and your first fanpage welcome post.

nextSteps.step1Desc: Add a cover, avatar, featured intro, and contact information to make the page look more trustworthy.
nextSteps.step2Desc: Depending on your goal, you can enable the message, call, view store, or follow button.
nextSteps.step3Desc: Pin an initial post to let newcomers know what you offer and how to interact with the fanpage.

page.seoDesc: Create a new fanpage on VNSEEA with a name, URL, description, and category, ready for the public page flow.

common.fillDesc: Complete the name, URL, description, and category to get your new {entity} ready to appear on VNSEEA.
common.identityBadge: Displays beautifully in search and sharing
common.introTitleGroup: Clearly describe the goal and target members
common.introTitlePage: Clearly describe the goal and target followers
common.introHint: Tip: specify who the {entity} is for, what the main content is, and the most prominent difference.
common.configTitleGroup: Choose reach and appropriate content group
common.configTitlePage: Choose the category closest to the page main content
common.finishHint: When finished, you can still go back to edit the cover image, description, and {extra}.
common.previewDescDefault: Your new {entity} will have a short description so others can understand the goal, topic, and how to participate.
common.privacyDescDefault: This setting determines who can find and view content in the {entity}.
common.categoryDescDefault: Please choose the category closest to the main topic of the {entity}.

insights.privacyDescDefault: Please choose visibility rights to control who can find and view group content.
insights.finishDesc: You can add a cover, avatar, and featured information right after creating {entity}.
insights.inviteDescGroup: Start with a small group to test the discussion rhythm and initial content.
insights.inviteDescPage: Pull the first follows from your customers, friends, or existing community.
insights.introPostDesc: Pin an opening post so newcomers know what you're sharing and where to start.

readiness.nameDesc: A concise name helps viewers recognize the {entity} theme immediately.
readiness.urlDesc: A clean path makes sharing {entity} easier.
readiness.descDesc: Explain who {entity} is for and what the content will focus on.
readiness.categoryDesc: {entity} will appear in a better context when the right category is chosen.
readiness.privacyDesc: This setting directly affects who can find and view {entity}.

message.label: Message
message.description: Suitable when you want to draw viewers to inbox for direct consultation.

follow.label: Follow
follow.description: Good for content fanpages, brands, or periodic update channels.

catalog.label: View catalog
catalog.description: Used for pages with product catalogs, services, or featured collections.

booking.label: Book now
booking.description: Suitable for studios, experts, classes, or services that need to close scheduled slots.

call.label: Call now
call.description: Suitable for local businesses or teams that need quick responses.

public.label: Public
public.description: Anyone can find the group and view basic content.

private.label: Private
private.description: Group is publicly visible but only members can view posts.

secret.label: Secret
secret.description: Only invited people can see and join the group.

auto.label: Auto & Vehicles
auto.description: For discussions on new cars, maintenance, reviews, and accessories.

business.label: Business
business.description: Focus on collaboration, sales, management, and business development.

technology.label: Technology
technology.description: Suitable for communities interested in software, AI, devices, and programming.

education.label: Education
education.description: Share knowledge, study materials, workshops, and mentoring.

travel.label: Travel
travel.description: Used to organize trips, share schedules, and practical experiences.

marketplace.label: Marketplace
marketplace.description: Suitable for groups exchanging products, deals, and group buying needs.

local-business.label: Local Business
local-business.description: Suitable for shops, studios, eateries, and brands operating locally.

creator.label: Creator & Professional
creator.description: For KOLs, experts, coaches, or people building personal brands.

brand.label: Brand & Product
brand.description: For fanpages introduced products, campaigns, deals, and brand updates.

organization.label: Organization & Community
organization.description: For organizations, clubs, social projects, and community programs.

service.label: Professional Service
service.description: Suitable for agencies, freelancers, service studios, and consulting teams.

groups.title: Groups
groups.descDefault: Manage the groups you follow, see suggestions based on your interests, and quickly start a new community creation flow in the same area.
groups.descSuggested: Discover communities suggested based on your interests, categories you care about, and recent activity in the VNSEEA ecosystem.
groups.descJoined: Return to the groups you have joined to follow new updates, upcoming events, and ongoing discussions.

empty.mineDesc: You haven't created or followed any groups in this account yet. Create a new group to start gathering members, posts, and community activities.
empty.noMatchDesc: Try changing the search keyword or switching to another tab to see more suitable communities.

status.suggestedCount: {count} communities waiting for you to discover

hint.mine: This list shows groups you created or manage. Currently, this account has no communities.
hint.suggested: Groups suggested based on your interests, recent activity, and existing network.
hint.joined: These are the communities you have joined, useful for returning to follow content and new updates.

card.privacyHint: Privacy settings currently applied to this group.

text.pinned: In {group}, everyone is discussing the topic {topic} very actively. This is a pinned post to quickly remind you to include real context for better quality feedback.
text.summary: Quick summary for this week of {group}: {activity}. New members can read this thread to understand hot topics and rules before posting for the first time.
text.detail: A topic of interest in {group}: practical experience, lessons learned, and the best references for tag #{topic}.

search.seoDesc: Search aggregate page for users, pages, groups and posts on VNSEEA.
search.seoDescQuery: Look up users, pages, groups and posts related to {query} on VNSEEA.

emptyValue.title: No matching results found
emptyValue.desc: No items match the keyword "{keyword}". Try changing the result type, rewriting, or selecting another suggestion.

emptyState.title: What are you looking for?
emptyState.desc: Enter a keyword above to find users, pages, groups, or posts. You can also start with the quick suggestions appearing in the filter.

controls.title: Discover users, pages, groups, and posts
controls.desc: Search by keyword, filter by result type, and quickly switch between datasets mathematically available in VNSEEA's mock social graph.

keywordParams.label: Keyword
keywordParams.placeholder: Search for users, pages, groups, posts, or #hashtags

results.label: Results
results.descEmpty: Results will appear here when you enter a keyword.
results.descAll: You are viewing an aggregate of all result types for "{keyword}". Select individual tabs if you want to dive into a specific dataset.
results.descSpecific: The list below has been filtered within {type} for the keyword "{keyword}".

total.label: Total Results
total.descEmpty: Number of items currently in mock data.

users.desc: Contacts, connection suggestions, and community members.

communities.label: Communities
communities.desc: Total pages and groups matching the current filter.

posts.desc: Discussions and content related to the keyword.

all.desc: Combine users, pages, groups, and posts.

users.desc: Find members, contacts, and connection suggestions.

pages.label: Pages

groups.label: Groups
groups.desc: Discover active communities in the ecosystem.

posts.label: Posts
posts.desc: Find discussions, recaps, and latest updates.

users.contactDescOnline: Currently active and can start a conversation immediately from the chat widget.
users.contactDescOffline: Appeared in contacts recently and can be invited to a new conversation.
users.suggestedDesc: {mutual} mutual friends in the VNSEEA ecosystem. This is a suitable connection to expand your network or exchange work.
users.memberDesc: {meta}. Member of {group}, suitable if you are looking for people with the same topic {topic}.

settings.title: Settings for {name}
settings.desc: Adjust the display profile, participation rights, and key operating policies of this community.

basics.title: Group Display Profile
basics.desc: Update name, URL, description, and background content to make the group page clearer when members visit.

fields.name: Group Name
fields.descPlaceholder: Describe who this group is for, the main content, and how to participate effectively.
fields.guidelines: Guidelines displayed on the group page
fields.guidelinesPlaceholder: Each line is a principle. Example: Prioritize posts sharing practical context.

controls.title: Privacy and Admin Flow
controls.desc: Set how members see the group, send requests to join, and post content in the community.
controls.noPrivacy: No privacy chosen for the group.

join.label: New Member Approval
join.desc: Admin reviews join requests before entering the group.

post.label: Review Posts Before Displaying
post.desc: New posts need moderator check before going on the feed.

invite.label: Allow Members to Invite Others
invite.desc: Current members can send direct invitations to friends.

directory.label: Display Member Directory
directory.desc: Member list still appears in sidebar and group about page.

welcome.label: Display Welcome Post
welcome.desc: New members will see a pinned post introducing rules and startup resources.

finish.title: Quick Actions
finish.desc: This settings flow is a UI mock. You can go back to the group page or continue tweaking before connecting the API.

sidebar.tip1Desc: New members often decide to join in the first 1-2 sentences of the introduction.
sidebar.tip2Title: Rules should be short and specific
sidebar.tip2Desc: Clearer rules make it easier for moderators to handle posts and join requests.

empty.title: Group to set up not found
empty.desc: This group slug is not in the current mock data. Please go back to the group list and select a valid community.

pageSettings.title: {name} Settings
pageSettings.desc: Adjust fanpage profile, main CTA, and some visibility signals before connecting the real admin API.

basics.title: Fanpage Profile
basics.desc: Update name, URL, description, and main identity signals to make the fanpage look clearer when visitors drop by.

fields.name: Page name
fields.summaryPlaceholder: Summarize the brand, service, or type of content this fanpage shares.
fields.responsePlaceholder: Example: Responds within a working day

controls.title: CTA and Public Signals
controls.desc: Tweak the primary action and decide what info will be pushed to the fanpage interface.
controls.logicDesc: Current CTA is **{cta}**. You can combine it with website display, message button, and engagement metrics to make the page's goal clearer.

toggles.messagesDesc: Allow visitors to quickly switch to inbox from the banner and action card.
toggles.followersDesc: Keep follower count on the intro section and preview page.
toggles.likesDesc: Keep like count as a social signal on the sidebar and about area.
toggles.websiteDesc: Hide or show the landing page/website link in the fanpage info section.
toggles.relatedDesc: Allow the system to insert similar suggestions in the discovery area later.

finish.title: Quick Actions
finish.desc: This page settings flow is currently a UI mock. You can go back to the fanpage to compare or continue tweaking before connecting the API.
finish.status: {enabled}/{total} signals enabled. Current main CTA is **{cta}**.

sidebar.discoveryOn: The system may insert similar fanpages to boost discovery.
sidebar.discoveryOff: You are turning off related fanpage suggestions on the UI.

empty.title: Fanpage to setup not found
empty.desc: This page slug does not exist in the current mock data. Go back to the list or creation flow to build a valid fanpage.

electric.name: Vietnam EV Community
electric.summary: EV reviews, charging stations, maintenance experience, and sharing real-life vehicle journeys.

guidelines.0: Prioritize real reviews with images or data when sharing experiences.
guidelines.1: Do not post direct sales outside of EV and related accessories topics.
guidelines.2: Keep discussions respectful, focused on solutions and useful knowledge.

founder.name: Founder Circle Vietnam
founder.summary: Space for exchanging operation, growth, and strategy problems for founders, C-levels, and builders.

guidelines.0: Share concisely, go straight to the problem and context needing advice.
guidelines.1: Do not post job recruitments or excessive service offers in the main feed.
guidelines.2: Respect privacy principles regarding internal data shared within the group.

ai.name: AI Product Builders
ai.summary: Focus on AI product, automation, dataset, prompt engineering, and new product demos every week.

guidelines.0: Prioritize demos with images, videos, or prototype links for quick feedback.
guidelines.1: Clearly tag goals: research, case study, prompt, automation, or launch.
guidelines.2: Avoid sharing sensitive customer data and company secret information.

learning.name: Travel & Learn
learning.summary: Group sharing workshops, courses, study materials, and meetup schedules for working professionals.

guidelines.0: Documents posted need to site sources so others can verify and continue learning.
guidelines.1: Encourage sharing short notes, summarizing key insights after each workshop.
guidelines.2: No spamming course links or unrelated affiliate content.

weekend.name: Weekend Escape Club
weekend.summary: Plan short trips, share concise schedules, homestays, and ticket hunting experience.

guidelines.0: When reviewing locations, include cost, travel time, and practical notes.
guidelines.1: Respect the local environment, avoid promoting activities that affect nature.
guidelines.2: Do not post tour hunting information with low credibility or unknown origin.

mocmay.name: Moc May Studio
mocmay.summary: Fanpage introducing wood furniture, home decoration concepts, and construction projects in modern minimalist style.

mobility.name: VNSEEA Mobility Lab
mobility.summary: Page updating research, events, and insights on electrified transport, charging stations, and green mobility infrastructure.

learning.name: Quick Learn Every Day
learning.summary: Fanpage sharing study notes, workshop schedules, and short documents for professionals wanting continuous skill updates.
